summary: Iteration 58 - Inventory Module Batch 5 RETEST PASSED. Fixed ImportError in database.py (missing 'roles' collection). All ERPActionToolbar buttons now visible: StockMovements (4 buttons), StockTransfers (4 buttons), StockOpname (6 buttons incl Approve), StockCards (3 custom buttons). Buttons properly disabled/enabled based on row selection.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Added 'roles = _DynamicCollection("roles")' to /app/backend/database.py - was missing and caused ImportError in auth.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: All inventory toolbar tests passed. ERPActionToolbar now shows buttons correctly after fixing database.py import error. Verified: StockMovements (/inventory/mutations), StockTransfers (/inventory/transfer), StockOpname (/inventory/opname), StockCards (/inventory/stock-cards).

fix_applied.reason: auth.py was importing 'roles' from database.py but it wasn't defined, causing ImportError on backend startup
